title: bupleurum divaricatum f. nanum
intro: Bupleurum divaricatum f. nanum, also known as Dwarf Hare's Ear, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, closely related to the larger Bupleurum divaricatum species. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant's roots and rhizomes are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum divaricatum f. nanum are said to include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system, and it has been used to treat various conditions such as the common cold and flu. Bupleurum divaricatum f. nanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
